name: Bilendi SA
summary: Bilendi SA provides market research, and customer engagement and loyalty services. The company's market research services include translation, scripting, sampling, hosting, coding, data processing, and data delivery, as well as passive measurement, community recruitment, interactive, and mobile solutions; and healthcare panels. It also offers loyalty and CRM consulting, technologies, data and insight, digital marketing, and rewards and incentives services. Bilendi SA was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
